% fig_lec01_mass_ratio.tex — Orbits with varying gravitational-to-inertial mass ratio
% Data: generated by scripts/sim_lec01_mass_ratio.jl

\begin{center}
\begin{tikzpicture}
\begin{axis}[
    grplot,
    width=7cm, height=7cm,
    xlabel={$x$},
    ylabel={$y$},
    title={Orbits with varying $m_g/m_I$},
    axis equal,
    legend pos=outer north east,
    legend cell align=left,
]
    % Trajectories for each mass ratio
    \addplot[no markers] table[x index=0, y index=1]
        {data/lec01_mass_ratio_085.dat};
    \addlegendentry{$\eta = 0.85$}

    \addplot[no markers] table[x index=0, y index=1]
        {data/lec01_mass_ratio_093.dat};
    \addlegendentry{$\eta = 0.93$}

    \addplot[no markers] table[x index=0, y index=1]
        {data/lec01_mass_ratio_100.dat};
    \addlegendentry{$\eta = 1.00$}

    \addplot[no markers] table[x index=0, y index=1]
        {data/lec01_mass_ratio_107.dat};
    \addlegendentry{$\eta = 1.07$}

    \addplot[no markers] table[x index=0, y index=1]
        {data/lec01_mass_ratio_115.dat};
    \addlegendentry{$\eta = 1.15$}

    % Central mass
    \addplot[only marks, mark=*, mark size=4pt, spacecadet, fill=spacecadet,
             forget plot]
        coordinates {(0, 0)};
    \node[font=\sf\scriptsize, text=spacecadet, anchor=north east]
        at (axis cs:-0.06, -0.06) {$M$};

    % Common starting point
    \addplot[only marks, mark=triangle*, mark size=3.5pt, banana,
             draw=spacecadet, thick, forget plot]
        coordinates {(1.0, 0)};
    \node[font=\sf\scriptsize, text=spacecadet, anchor=south west]
        at (axis cs:1.04, 0.04) {start};
\end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{center}
